q: Ronaldo became the first player to appear in how many UEFA European Championships?
Ronaldo is the only player to have scored in how many different FIFA World Cups?
What is Ronaldo's approximate career goal tally as of early 2026, making him close to 1,000?
In which country did Ronaldo sign for Al-Nassr, and when did he join?
a: Saudi Arabia; he joined in January 2023

q: How many goals did Ronaldo score in his first Saudi Pro League season at Al-Nassr?
a: 35 goals in his first full Saudi season (2023–24)
